specific_question: How many customer service representatives work during peak hours versus off-peak hours from January 2025 to September 2025?
answer: From January to September 2025, 12 representatives are scheduled during peak hours, which is between 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM EST. In off-peak hours, between 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM EST, only 8 representatives are working. On evening shifts, from 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM EST, there are only 6 representatives on duty.
dr_question: A 2022 patient experience report found that six in 10 patients identified poor online booking tools and convoluted call centers as barriers to making appointments. When individual patients or corporate employees struggle to book appointments on MediConn Solutions' platform, how can I determine whether the root cause is poot booking tool design or convoluted customer support processes?
